THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KY, TECH B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, DAVID $2,473.25 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,513.25, DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO LEPTAK, CHRISTOPHE LUU, MICHAEL AND KIM, MOC TRAN PLAINTIFF TO RETURN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
